name: Garbanzo Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, process the cottage cheese, egg substitute or egg whites, parsley, cumin, coriander, garlic, chili powder and sesame oil on medium speed until smooth.
2. Add the chickpeas and process on low speed until smooth. Stir in the wheat germ.
3. Coat a medium skillet with nonstick spray. Heat the skillet over medium heat.
4. Form the bean mixture into four burgers and add the burgers to the skillet.
5. Cook until the burgers are golden brown and cooked through, about 6 minutes on each side.
6. Serve in the pita pockets with the tomatoes, scallions and sprouts. Top each with a dollop of yogurt.
